Hong T. Le, Esq. of McKENNA LONG & ALDRIDGE (415-267-4124), appearing for defendant / moving party Tecumseh Products Company
Katherine Y. Wang, Esq. of HAROWITZ & TIGERMAN (415-788-1588) for plaintiffs / opposing parteis Edward Lopez, et al.

RULING:
DEFENDANT TECUMSEH PRODUCTS COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Argued and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Tecumseh Products Company's motion for summary judgment is granted. Defendant sustained its burden of production and plaintiffs failed to present evidence creating a triable issue whether Mr. Lopez ever worked with or around any Tecumseh semi-hermetic compressors, and even if he did, whether he was exposed to any asbestos-containing parts or materials attributable to defendant. Prevailing party is to prepare an order. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077 = (220/HEK)
